headline: A Look At Constellation Energy’s Valuation After Strong 1 Year Returns And Recent Pullback
summary: Why Constellation Energy is on investors’ radar Constellation Energy (CEG) has drawn fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock last closing at US$301.77 and producing a 1 year total return of 38.784%. For investors tracking utilities, the company’s current size of about US$109.24b, alongside reported annual revenue of US$25.53b and net income of US$2.32b, raises questions about how its valuation lines up with its growth profile. See our latest analysis for Constellation...
